pages.raw_text:
The county commissioners yesterday
set November as the date for the
hearing of an appeal from the decis
ION Of County Superintendent OF
Schools Watkins granting petition
of residents of district l49 to be trans
ferred to district l04, west of the city
The act of the superintendent placed
the southeast quarter of section L.
25-42 over into district l04.


M. L. Goetchins filed a petition with
the commissioners, appealing from the
action of the superintendent on the
ground that there was no reason for
the change, as district 149 has a small
attendance at best and the new ar
rangement is no more convenient than
the old.


The commissioners set the hearing
on the Milan well and water pipe fran
chse fol. November 3.
